properties.name: Meeting
properties.description: Root aggregate representing a single meeting being processed. Owns Recording, Transcript, Protocol references and tracks overall pipeline status.

properties.name: Recording
properties.description: Metadata for the uploaded video file (filename, size, MIME, storage path). Physical file lives in EXT-04 Object Storage.

properties.name: TranscriptionJob
properties.description: Async job tracking the ASR+diarization pipeline for a recording. Surfaces success/failure and error details.

properties.name: Transcript
properties.description: Persisted verbatim speaker-attributed transcript from ASR+diarization. Segments stored inline at MVP scope.

properties.name: ProtocolGenerationJob
properties.description: Async job tracking LLM-based protocol generation for a transcript. Auto-created when transcription completes.

properties.name: Protocol
properties.description: Persisted meeting protocol Markdown produced by LLM and refined by user. Sections: participants, topics, decisions, action items. Version-incremented on save.
